definition: A sequence of data processing steps
example: We built a data pipeline to automate processing.
The dataset contains thousands of user records.

definition: A mathematical representation used to make predictions
example: The model was trained on historical data.

definition: The effectiveness or efficiency of a system
example: We improved the system performance significantly.

definition: The degree to which results are correct
The delay before a system responds
example: High latency can affect user experience.

definition: Able to handle increasing workload or growth
To make something as efficient or effective as possible
example: We need to optimize the algorithm.
